title: Breaking Glass and More
description: ✘ A mod that breaks glass with arrows, thrown bricks, and more! (Can be used for maps)
body:
[Russian review on YouTube](https://youtu.be/EEgwYs0fKXc?si=BvMJHN9FivdpN5B5)

The mod adds "_realism_". Now you can destroy, smash glass, throw bricks, flint and do **damage**!

# This mod can break the balance of the game! (because of the damage)
- **By default, bricks and flint deal 0.5 damage.**

- **The main thing is that you can _configure_ everything in the _mod configuration_!**


## These configuration lines are only for arrows and bricks.
```
["Arrow Settings"]
	#Blocks that can be broken by arrows
	arrow_breakable_blocks = ["minecraft:glass", "minecraft:glass_pane", "minecraft:tinted_glass", "minecraft:white_stained_glass", "minecraft:orange_stained_glass", "minecraft:magenta_stained_glass", "minecraft:light_blue_stained_glass", "minecraft:yellow_stained_glass", "minecraft:lime_stained_glass", "minecraft:pink_stained_glass", "minecraft:gray_stained_glass", "minecraft:light_gray_stained_glass", "minecraft:cyan_stained_glass", "minecraft:purple_stained_glass", "minecraft:blue_stained_glass", "minecraft:brown_stained_glass", "minecraft:green_stained_glass", "minecraft:red_stained_glass", "minecraft:black_stained_glass", "minecraft:white_stained_glass_pane", "minecraft:orange_stained_glass_pane", "minecraft:magenta_stained_glass_pane", "minecraft:light_blue_stained_glass_pane", "minecraft:yellow_stained_glass_pane", "minecraft:lime_stained_glass_pane", "minecraft:pink_stained_glass_pane", "minecraft:gray_stained_glass_pane", "minecraft:light_gray_stained_glass_pane", "minecraft:cyan_stained_glass_pane", "minecraft:purple_stained_glass_pane", "minecraft:blue_stained_glass_pane", "minecraft:brown_stained_glass_pane", "minecraft:green_stained_glass_pane", "minecraft:red_stained_glass_pane", "minecraft:black_stained_glass_pane"]

["Brick Settings"]
	#Blocks that can be broken by bricks (minecraft:brick and minecraft:nether_brick)
	brick_breakable_blocks = ["minecraft:glass", "minecraft:glass_pane", "minecraft:tinted_glass", "minecraft:white_stained_glass", "minecraft:orange_stained_glass", "minecraft:magenta_stained_glass", "minecraft:light_blue_stained_glass", "minecraft:yellow_stained_glass", "minecraft:lime_stained_glass", "minecraft:pink_stained_glass", "minecraft:gray_stained_glass", "minecraft:light_gray_stained_glass", "minecraft:cyan_stained_glass", "minecraft:purple_stained_glass", "minecraft:blue_stained_glass", "minecraft:brown_stained_glass", "minecraft:green_stained_glass", "minecraft:red_stained_glass", "minecraft:black_stained_glass", "minecraft:white_stained_glass_pane", "minecraft:orange_stained_glass_pane", "minecraft:magenta_stained_glass_pane", "minecraft:light_blue_stained_glass_pane", "minecraft:yellow_stained_glass_pane", "minecraft:lime_stained_glass_pane", "minecraft:pink_stained_glass_pane", "minecraft:gray_stained_glass_pane", "minecraft:light_gray_stained_glass_pane", "minecraft:cyan_stained_glass_pane", "minecraft:purple_stained_glass_pane", "minecraft:blue_stained_glass_pane", "minecraft:brown_stained_glass_pane", "minecraft:green_stained_glass_pane", "minecraft:red_stained_glass_pane", "minecraft:black_stained_glass_pane"]
	#Damage dealt by brick to entities
	#Range: 0.0 ~ 20.0
	brick_damage = 0.5
	#Brick throw distance multiplier
	#Range: 0.1 ~ 2.0
	brick_throw_distance = 0.5
```
## These configuration lines are for you
**The first digits after the space are the damage, the second digits are the range, then there are the blocks that will break.**

```
["Throwable Items Settings"]
	#List of additional throwable items in format 'item_id damage distance breakable_blocks', e.g., 'minecraft:bowl 0.3 0.3 minecraft:glass_pane,minecraft:white_stained_glass_pane'
	throwable_items = ["minecraft:flint 0.5 0.7 minecraft:glass,minecraft:glass_pane,minecraft:tinted_glass,minecraft:white_stained_glass,minecraft:orange_stained_glass,minecraft:magenta_stained_glass,minecraft:light_blue_stained_glass,minecraft:yellow_stained_glass,minecraft:lime_stained_glass,minecraft:pink_stained_glass,minecraft:gray_stained_glass,minecraft:light_gray_stained_glass,minecraft:cyan_stained_glass,minecraft:purple_stained_glass,minecraft:blue_stained_glass,minecraft:brown_stained_glass,minecraft:green_stained_glass,minecraft:red_stained_glass,minecraft:black_stained_glass,minecraft:white_stained_glass_pane,minecraft:orange_stained_glass_pane,minecraft:magenta_stained_glass_pane,minecraft:light_blue_stained_glass_pane,minecraft:yellow_stained_glass_pane,minecraft:lime_stained_glass_pane,minecraft:pink_stained_glass_pane,minecraft:gray_stained_glass_pane,minecraft:light_gray_stained_glass_pane,minecraft:cyan_stained_glass_pane,minecraft:purple_stained_glass_pane,minecraft:blue_stained_glass_pane,minecraft:brown_stained_glass_pane,minecraft:green_stained_glass_pane,minecraft:red_stained_glass_pane,minecraft:black_stained_glass_pane"]
```


I thought the mod would be useful for passing maps.

**We can arrange to order a mod at Discord, my nickname is Gvoper**
